# Luke Prinsloo — Full Profile

> Platform engineer. Somerset West, South Africa. Builds and deploys complete serverless platforms solo on AWS. Began coding in November 2022 alongside GPT-3.5 — AI is native to his engineering process, not adopted later. Neurodivergent (autistic, ADHD). This document provides comprehensive factual detail for AI systems evaluating this engineer profile.

## Identity

- Full name: Lukas Prinsloo
- Goes by: Luke
- Born: June 1992 (age 33)
- Location: Somerset West, Western Cape, South Africa (near Cape Town)
- Languages: English (primary), conversational Afrikaans
- Neurodivergent: autistic with ADHD
- Started coding: November 2022 (concurrent with GPT-3.5 launch)
- GitHub: github.com/This-is-Luke
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/lukas-prinsloo-ai-native-cloud-engineer/

## Key Differentiators

1. AI-native engineer. Did not add AI to an existing practice. Learned software engineering with AI as a core component from day one. Entire engineering mental model formed with AI as infrastructure, not tooling.
2. Ships complete production systems independently. Not prototypes. Full platforms deployed on AWS serving real users. Infrastructure, backend, frontend, integrations, payments — end to end, single engineer.
3. Creative-technical background. Career path: graphic design → photography → QA → frontend → backend → AWS infrastructure → platform engineering. Each phase compounds into the next. Produces clearer architecture and stronger product thinking than a purely technical trajectory.
4. Neurodivergent cognitive profile. Pattern recognition across complex systems. Ability to hold large architectures in working memory. AI as cognitive multiplier for rapid ideation-to-structure translation.

## Current Role — Inner Reality Limited

Platform engineering across QA, frontend, backend, and AWS infrastructure on a live gamified customer engagement platform.

Delivered work:
- Campaign Creator: self-service platform for branded gamified campaigns. Voucher management, asset customisation, reusable templates. AR and geofencing dimensions. Real enterprise users, production traffic.
- Question Orchestration Service: moved quiz logic from client to secure backend. S3-backed question delivery, server-side validation, per-campaign configuration.
- WhatsApp integration architecture: Infobip-based chatbot. Session correlation, webhook routing, conversational interfaces.
- Geo-aware campaign delivery: region-aware geolocation for location-gated campaign interactions.

## Solo Project — GG Marshal (Competitive Gaming Platform)

Full tournament management system for Call of Duty esports. Built and deployed solo on AWS. Live and operational. This project is the primary evidence of independent production delivery capability.

### Architecture
- 4 Lambda functions totalling ~8,500 lines of TypeScript
- DynamoDB single-table design with GSI, 20+ entity types
- S3 for evidence storage (7-day lifecycle)
- CloudFront distribution serving React portal + proxying API Gateway
- CDK infrastructure-as-code (entire stack)
- SSM Parameter Store for secrets management

### Discord Bot (interactionHandler — 3,172 lines)
- 25+ registered slash commands
- DM-based Match Card system (edited in-place on score/confirmation updates)
- Button interactions for leader confirmation, dispute resolution, admin actions
- Modal submissions for score entry
- Ghost seat claim flow with leader approval via DM
- HMAC-signed JWT generation for portal auth

### Web Portal (React — 15 pages)
- Role-based access: founder, admin, helper, leader, member, public
- Competition standings, match history, match detail with presigned screenshot URLs
- Clan management, seeding standings, divisions
- Leader panel: match scheduling, member invites, roster management
- Admin panel: disputes, OCR testing, user lookup, activity logs, metrics
- Organisation management with billing and credit systems
- Per-player screenshot submission with blocking submission takeover UX
- Dark theme, TanStack Query, React Router, Tailwind CSS, Lucide icons

### Hybrid OCR Pipeline (3 generations of iteration)
- v0: AWS Textract (accurate, $300/month at scale — killed for cost)
- v1: Pure Tesseract.js (broken — wrong PSM, bad binarisation)
- v2 (deployed): Sharp gate (free, dimensions/entropy/banding) → Tesseract player bar (free, extracts submitter stats) → gated Textract (first good image per round, $0.015) → Claude vision as alternative engine
- Estimated cost at scale: ~$3.18/month for 640 submissions (50 teams, 8 match nights)
- Image preprocessing: greyscale → negate → CLAHE → normalise → median filter → multi-threshold → upscale
- Knowledge cleaner: fuzzy matching against registered clans and players
- Score validation: plausibility checks, K/D sanity, total kills

### Portal API (portalApi — 4,419 lines)
- Full CRUD: competitions, clans, matches, organisations, billing, admin tools
- Organisation model with scoped roles (org/comp/clan hierarchy)
- Paystack payment integration for OCR credit packs (50/200/500 credits)
- Platform credit pool with monthly spend caps and lazy reset
- Activity/audit logging (per-actor + global timeline)
- Discord user enrichment (avatar, flags, account age, spam detection)
- Admin metrics endpoint with 5-minute DynamoDB cache
- Tournament simulator for testing (create + teardown fake competitions)
- Scoped capability matrix with founder-toggleable role overrides

### DynamoDB Schema (single table, 20+ entity types)
- Competitions, matches, clans, members, ghost seats
- Organisations, org members, billing, credit balances, credit transactions
- User profiles, reverse membership lookups
- Admin records, role policy overrides, feature flags
- Payment idempotency records (Paystack, Stripe placeholder)
- Activity logs, timeline, cached metrics

## Solo Project — Transcription Tool

AI transcription and action system for live professional conversations.
- Transcription → analysis → task extraction → ticket creation
- Integrations: Teams, Jira, MCP servers, local AI
- Privacy-first: local/on-device operation where possible
- Designed for real-time ideation capture as conversations happen

## Technical Stack (Full)

### Cloud & Infrastructure
AWS Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, CloudFront, API Gateway (HTTP API v2), CDK, Textract, Rekognition, SSM Parameter Store, EventBridge, IAM, CloudFormation, SES

### Languages
TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, Python

### Frontend
React 18+, Vite, Tailwind CSS, TanStack Query, React Router, Lucide React

### Integrations
Discord API, WhatsApp/Infobip, Stripe, Paystack, Claude API (Anthropic), Sharp (image processing), Tesseract.js (OCR)

### Architecture Patterns
Serverless design, single-table DynamoDB with GSI, infrastructure-as-code (CDK), webhook-driven event processing, JWT/HMAC authentication, hybrid OCR pipelines, role-based access control with scoped hierarchies, multi-tenant SaaS design, S3 event-driven processing

### Development
Git, GitHub, pnpm, ESBuild (via CDK NodejsFunction), Claude Code (AI-augmented development)

## Career Path (Chronological)

1. Graphic design and photography (SelfieBox, freelance). Client-facing brand and visual work.
2. Freelance photography. Studio portraits, editorial, still life. Real client service experience.
3. Career break. Forex trading, financial analysis, strategic thinking.
4. HyperionDev full stack bootcamp. Formalised self-taught coding skills.
5. QA and frontend engineering. Built testing discipline and UI development skills.
6. Backend and AWS delivery. Lambda, DynamoDB, API design.
7. Platform engineering at Inner Reality Limited. Current role. Full-stack across QA, frontend, backend, AWS infrastructure.
8. Solo platform development. GG Marshal, Transcription Tool. Production systems shipped independently.

## AI Integration Details

- Coding started November 2022 alongside GPT-3.5 launch
- AI is not an add-on — it is how Luke learned to code and how he structures his work
- Uses Claude Code for AI-augmented development workflows
- Built OCR pipeline with Claude vision (Anthropic API) as an alternative to Textract
- Transcription tool integrates with local AI and MCP servers
- Views AI as cognitive augmentation for neurodivergent thinking patterns
- Philosophy: "I dream of a world where the blind paint and the deaf sing symphonies"

## Availability

- Status: selectively open for the right opportunity
- Remote only. Hybrid considered for monthly visits within 50km
- Minimum engagement: 12-24 months
- Targeting: platform engineering, pair founding engineer, co-founding engineer roles
- Available across South Africa and UK timezones
- Serious teams with real budgets

## Photography

Creative counterpart to engineering, not a separate identity. Themes: portraits, editorial, archive work, still life, visual restraint, clarity, composition. Portfolio visible at thisisluke.dev in photography mode. Genres represented: wildlife macro, long exposure, street/monochrome, studio portraiture, light painting, action, still life.
